== Notes for [[Item:Q107867|Q107867]] ==

* '''Governor of al-Kufah (Iraq) of 1st Abbasid Caliph [http://www.geni.com/people/Caliph-Abu-l-Abbas-al-Saffah-bin-Muhammad-al-Kamil/6000000010761163296/ Abu'l 'Abbas al-Saffah] & 2nd Abbasid Caliph [http://www.geni.com/people/Caliph-Abu-Ja-afar-Abdallah-al-Mans%C5%ABr-bin-Muhammad-al-Kamil/6000000007624466659/ Abdallah al-Mansūr]'''

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isa_ibn_Musa

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008649237292

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
